scenarioName: Bluesky Keyword and Mention Alerts from a Persistent Apify Task

scenarioSettings.schedule: Make scenario schedule; do not overlap executions for the same Task

requirements.pollWindowFormula: covered_minutes = pollRunLimit * Apify Schedule interval minutes; if expected outage can exceed this, implement paginated backfill before activation

authentication.tokenScope: Reviewed limited Apify token; do not use Make Apify connector or full-access OAuth.
authentication.exportScrub: Remove real Authorization values from every blueprint export and screenshot.

runWindow.sort: desc from Apify; reverse the fetched page before module 5 so uncheckpointed runs are processed oldest-to-newest within the page
runWindow.officialPagination: Apify task-runs API supports limit and offset; limit maximum is 1000.
runWindow.overflowGuard: Modules 2-4 must read pre-existing run checkpoints and stop before module 5 if module 1 returns count=1000 and no checkpointed terminal run boundary exists. This prevents silent misses after more than 1000 uncheckpointed runs.

modules.label: Preflight Existing Run Checkpoints
modules.route: after module 1 before any product or run-checkpoint write
modules.purpose: Read pre-existing run checkpoint keys for the fetched Task-run page before this execution can write any new run checkpoints.

modules.label: Preflight Overflow Guard
modules.route: after module 2 before any product or run-checkpoint write

outputs.preExistingCheckpointBoundaryFound: any terminal run in module 1 has key bluesky:run:<runId> in module 2 records[].key
outputs.reversedRuns: module 1 data.items[] reversed oldest-to-newest within the fetched desc page

modules.invariant: This guard uses only checkpoints that existed before this execution writes new checkpoints.

modules.label: Overflow Guard Router
modules.route: after module 3 before any product or run-checkpoint write
modules.invariant: The overflowStop route ends with a diagnostic and must not reach module 5 or any product/run-checkpoint write. Use paginated/manual backfill before resuming.

routes.datasetAvailable: run status is terminal AND checkpoint is missing AND defaultDatasetId exists
routes.missingDataset: run status is terminal AND checkpoint is missing AND defaultDatasetId does not exist
routes.alreadyCheckpointedOrNonTerminal: checkpoint exists OR run status is not terminal

modules.label: HTTP Get Dataset Items
modules.capInvariant: This specification is intentionally non-paginated. The saved Task maxPostsPerRun must be no greater than 100 for this product-specific retrieval window.

configuration.targetStructure: all Bluesky post fields required by module 12

routes.validPost: uri exists AND url exists AND isNew = true
routes.invalidPost: uri missing OR url missing OR isNew != true

modules.nativeIdempotency: Add/Replace with overwrite enabled leaves exactly one record for the stable key, including after an ambiguous retry.

modules.purpose: Credential-free diagnostic visible in Make execution history; end this branch successfully.
Report the non-success terminal status only after the committed post bundle has been idempotently persisted.
Report a terminal run whose fetched dataset contains no rows; no product destination write is attempted.
Report any terminal run without a defaultDatasetId and end safely without requesting dataset items.

modules.label: Write Run Checkpoint
modules.route: after all uncheckpointed terminal branches finish row persistence and diagnostics

record.sourceUrl: Apify Task run URL when available
record.title: Task run checkpoint
record.payloadJson: JSON string of run id, status, defaultDatasetId, processedAt, and row counts

modules.checkpointInvariant: Write this checkpoint only after all product row upserts and diagnostics for the run have completed. If Make fails before this module, the next poll must replay the run idempotently.

terminalFailureRoute.datasetWithRows: module 15 runs after module 13 persisted the stable bluesky:<postUri> key
terminalFailureRoute.emptyDataset: module 16 reports the fetched zero-row dataset
terminalFailureRoute.missingDataset: module 17 does not request dataset items
terminalFailureRoute.then: write module 18 run checkpoint last; do not throw an error that could disable the scenario

errorHandlers.scenario: Set Store incomplete executions to Yes and process in order/no overlap.

destination.resumeAt: module 13 with the same post bundle
destination.requiredProof: Inject a timeout after the Data store commit, retry, and verify exactly one record exists for bluesky:postUri.

runCheckpoint.requiredProof: Run checkpoint is written last; duplicate polls leave exactly one checkpoint.

preflightCheckpointSearch.resumeAt: module 2 before any product or run-checkpoint write
preflightCheckpointSearch.never: write product rows or run checkpoints before preflight succeeds

publicationGate: Build in a user-owned Make account, configure the scenario schedule, confirm maxPostsPerRun is no greater than 100, and set Store incomplete executions to Yes plus process-in-order/no-overlap behavior.

Use HTTP polling, not the Make Apify connector: list recent Task runs with desc=1&limit=1000&offset=0, reverse the fetched page before processing, skip checkpointed run IDs, stop loudly if a full 1000-run page has no checkpoint boundary, and fetch dataset items with the fixed non-paginated retrieval limit of 100.
Prove the reviewed limited Apify token can list Task runs and fetch default dataset items; scrub Authorization headers, Task IDs, data-store IDs, execution data, and sample payloads from exports.

Run non-empty, quiet, invalid-record, FAILED, ABORTED, TIMED-OUT, missing-dataset-ID, duplicate-poll replay, dataset-retry, run-window, preflight overflow-stop using only pre-existing checkpoint keys, run-checkpoint, and Data-store-retry tests; inject a post-commit timeout and prove exactly one record for the product key and exactly one run checkpoint exist for the stable keys.
Export and scrub the candidate blueprint.
Import that exact file into a fresh empty validation organization/team or clean account.
Reconnect the limited HTTP credential/header placeholder, save and activate only for validation, then repeat the full matrix after exact-file import.
Obtain independent validator PASS and separate adversarial PASS before publication.
